AxReportDesign.Name: Report
AxReportDesign.Text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <Report xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/sqlserver/reporting/2016/01/reportdefinition" xmlns:rd="http://schemas.microsoft.com/SQLServer/reporting/reportdesigner"> <AutoRefresh>0</AutoRefresh> <DataSources> <DataSource Name="AutoGen__ReportDataProvider"> <Transaction>true</Transaction> <ConnectionProperties> <DataProvider>AXREPORTDATAPROVIDER</DataProvider> <ConnectString /> <IntegratedSecurity>true</IntegratedSecurity> </ConnectionProperties> <rd:DataSourceID>bb4ef001-7a14-46b5-922c-f9e9db91f7da</rd:DataSourceID> </DataSource> </DataSources> <DataSets> <DataSet Name="ReportDS"> <Query> <DataSourceName>AutoGen__ReportDataProvider</DataSourceName> <QueryParameters> <QueryParameter Name="AX_PartitionKey"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_PartitionKey.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_CompanyName"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_CompanyName.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_UserContext"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_UserContext.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_RenderingCulture"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_RenderingCulture.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_ReportContext"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_ReportContext.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_RdpPreProcessedId"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_RdpPreProcessedId.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="ETGVENDINVOICEOPENTRA_DynamicParameter"> <Value>=Parameters!ETGVENDINVOICEOPENTRA_DynamicParameter.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> </QueryParameters> <CommandText>SELECT * FROM ETGVendInvoiceOpenTransDP.ETGVendInvoiceOpenTransTemp</CommandText> <rd:UseGenericDesigner>true</rd:UseGenericDesigner> </Query> <Fields> <Field Name="CurrencyCode"> <DataField>ETGVendInvoiceOpenTransTemp.1.CurrencyCode</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="DueDate"> <DataField>ETGVendInvoiceOpenTransTemp.1.DueDate</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.DateTime</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGAmountDue"> <DataField>ETGVendInvoiceOpenTransTemp.1.ETGAmountDue</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGDaysToDue"> <DataField>ETGVendInvoiceOpenTransTemp.1.ETGDaysToDue</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Int32</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="InvoiceAccount"> <DataField>ETGVendInvoiceOpenTransTemp.1.InvoiceAccount</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="InvoiceAmount"> <DataField>ETGVendInvoiceOpenTransTemp.1.InvoiceAmount</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="InvoiceDate"> <DataField>ETGVendInvoiceOpenTransTemp.1.InvoiceDate</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.DateTime</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="InvoiceId"> <DataField>ETGVendInvoiceOpenTransTemp.1.InvoiceId</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="Party"> <DataField>ETGVendInvoiceOpenTransTemp.1.Party</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> </Fields> <rd:DataSetInfo> <rd:DataSetName>ReportDS</rd:DataSetName> <rd:TableName>Fields</rd:TableName> <rd:TableAdapterFillMethod>Fill</rd:TableAdapterFillMethod> <rd:TableAdapterGetDataMethod>GetData</rd:TableAdapterGetDataMethod> <rd:TableAdapterName>FieldsTableAdapter</rd:TableAdapterName> </rd:DataSetInfo> </DataSet> </DataSets> <ReportSections> <ReportSection> <Body> <ReportItems> <Tablix Name="Tablix2"> <TablixBody> <TablixColumns> <TablixColumn> <Width>1in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>1in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>1in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>1in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>1in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>1in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>1in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>1in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>1in</Width> </TablixColumn> </TablixColumns> <TablixRows> <TablixRow> <Height>0.25in</Height> <TablixCells> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="Textbox2"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>Account</Value> <Style> <FontSize>8pt</FontSize> <FontWeight>Bold</FontWeight> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style> <TextAlign>Center</TextAlign> </Style> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox1</rd:DefaultName> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="Textbox4"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>Party Name</Value> <Style> <FontSize>8pt</FontSize> <FontWeight>Bold</FontWeight> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style> <TextAlign>Center</TextAlign> </Style> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox3</rd:DefaultName> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="Textbox6"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>Invoice</Value> <Style> <FontSize>8pt</FontSize> <FontWeight>Bold</FontWeight> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style> <TextAlign>Center</TextAlign> </Style> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox5</rd:DefaultName> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="Textbox8"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>Invoice Date</Value> <Style> <FontSize>8pt</FontSize> <FontWeight>Bold</FontWeight> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style> <TextAlign>Center</TextAlign> </Style> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox7</rd:DefaultName> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="Textbox10"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>Due Date</Value> <Style> <FontSize>8pt</FontSize> <FontWeight>Bold</FontWeight> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style> <TextAlign>Center</TextAlign> </Style> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox9</rd:DefaultName> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="Textbox12"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>Currency</Value> <Style> <FontSize>8pt</FontSize> <FontWeight>Bold</FontWeight> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style> <TextAlign>Center</TextAlign> </Style> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox11</rd:DefaultName> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="Textbox14"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>Invoice Amount</Value> <Style> <FontSize>8pt</FontSize> <FontWeight>Bold</FontWeight> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style> <TextAlign>Center</TextAlign> </Style> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox13</rd:DefaultName> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="Textbox16"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>Amount Due</Value> <Style> <FontSize>8pt</FontSize> <FontWeight>Bold</FontWeight> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style> <TextAlign>Center</TextAlign> </Style> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox15</rd:DefaultName> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="Textbox18"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>Days to Due</Value> <Style> <FontSize>8pt</FontSize> <FontWeight>Bold</FontWeight> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style> <TextAlign>Center</TextAlign> </Style> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox17</rd:DefaultName> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> </TablixCells> </TablixRow> <TablixRow> <Height>0.25in</Height> <TablixCells> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="InvoiceAccount1"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=Fields!InvoiceAccount.Value</Value> <Style> <FontSize>8pt</FontSize> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style> <TextAlign>Left</TextAlign> </Style> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>InvoiceAccount1</rd:DefaultName> <CustomProperties> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXDataType</Name> <Value>String</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTFormat</Name> <Value>ETGVendInvoiceOpenTransTemp.InvoiceAccount</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTTextAlign</Name> <Value>ETGVendInvoiceOpenTransTemp.InvoiceAccount</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTDirection</Name> <Value>ETGVendInvoiceOpenTransTemp.InvoiceAccount</Value> </CustomProperty> </CustomProperties> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="Party2"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Party</rd:DefaultName> <CustomProperties> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXDataType</Name> <Value>String</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTFormat</Name> <Value>ETGVendInvoiceOpenTransTemp.Party</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTTextAlign</Name> <Value>ETGVendInvoiceOpenTransTemp.Party</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTDirection</Name> <Value>ETGVendInvoiceOpenTransTemp.Party</Value> </CustomProperty> </CustomProperties> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="InvoiceId2"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=Fields!InvoiceId.Value</Value> <Style> <FontSize>8pt</FontSize> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style> <TextAlign>Left</TextAlign> </Style> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <Value>ETGVendInvoiceOpenTransTemp.InvoiceId</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTTextAlign</Name> <Value>ETGVendInvoiceOpenTransTemp.InvoiceId</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTDirection</Name> <Value>ETGVendInvoiceOpenTransTemp.InvoiceId</Value> </CustomProperty> </CustomProperties> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="InvoiceDate2"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=Fields!InvoiceDate.Value</Value> <Style> <Value>DateTime</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTFormat</Name> <Value>ETGVendInvoiceOpenTransTemp.DueDate</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTTextAlign</Name> <Value>ETGVendInvoiceOpenTransTemp.DueDate</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTDirection</Name> <Value>ETGVendInvoiceOpenTransTemp.DueDate</Value> </CustomProperty> </CustomProperties> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="CurrencyCode1"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=Fields!CurrencyCode.Value</Value> <Style> <FontSize>8pt</FontSize> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style> <TextAlign>Left</TextAlign> </Style> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>CurrencyCode1</rd:DefaultName> <CustomProperties> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXDataType</Name> <Value>String</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTFormat</Name> <Value>ETGVendInvoiceOpenTransTemp.CurrencyCode</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTTextAlign</Name> <Value>ETGVendInvoiceOpenTransTemp.CurrencyCode</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTDirection</Name> <Value>ETGVendInvoiceOpenTransTemp.CurrencyCode</Value> </CustomProperty> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="InvoiceAmount2"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=Fields!InvoiceAmount.Value</Value> <Style> <FontSize>8pt</FontSize> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style> <TextAlign>Left</TextAlign> </Style> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>InvoiceAmount</rd:DefaultName> <CustomProperties> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXDataType</Name> <Value>Float</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTFormat</Name> <Value>ETGVendInvoiceOpenTransTemp.InvoiceAmount</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTTextAlign</Name> <Value>ETGVendInvoiceOpenTransTemp.InvoiceAmount</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTDirection</Name> <Value>ETGVendInvoiceOpenTransTemp.InvoiceAmount</Value> </CustomProperty> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=Fields!ETGAmountDue.Value</Value> <Style> <FontSize>8pt</FontSize> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style> <TextAlign>Left</TextAlign> </Style> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>ETGAmountDue</rd:DefaultName> <CustomProperties> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXDataType</Name> <Value>Float</Value> </CustomProperties> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="ETGDaysToDue2"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=Fields!ETGDaysToDue.Value</Value> <Style> <FontSize>8pt</FontSize> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style> <TextAlign>Left</TextAlign> </Style> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>ETGDaysToDue</rd:DefaultName> <CustomProperties> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXDataType</Name> <Value>Integer</Value> <Value>ETGVendInvoiceOpenTransTemp.ETGDaysToDue</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTDirection</Name> <Value>ETGVendInvoiceOpenTransTemp.ETGDaysToDue</Value> </CustomProperty> <Height>0.525in</Height> <Style> <TopBorder> <Color>Black</Color> <Style>None</Style> <Width>1pt</Width> </TopBorder> <BottomBorder> <Color>Black</Color> <Style>None</Style> <Width>1pt</Width> </Body> <Width>9in</Width> <Page> <PageHeader> <Height>0.48503in</Height> <PrintOnFirstPage>true</PrintOnFirstPage> <PrintOnLastPage>true</PrintOnLastPage> <ReportItems> <Textbox Name="Textbox_19"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <CanShrink>true</CanShrink> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value EvaluationMode="Constant">Vendor Open Invoices</Value> <Style> <FontStyle>Normal</FontStyle> <FontFamily>Segoe UI</FontFamily> <FontSize>14pt</FontSize> <FontWeight>Bold</FontWeight> <TextDecoration>None</TextDecoration> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style> <TextAlign>Left</TextAlign> </Style> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <Height>0.28293in</Height> <Width>5.925in</Width> <Style> <TopBorder> <Color>Black</Color> <Style>None</Style> <Width>1pt</Width> </TopBorder> <BottomBorder> <Color>Black</Color> <Style>None</Style> <Width>1pt</Width> </BottomBorder> <LeftBorder> <Color>Black</Color> <Style>None</Style> <Width>1pt</Width> </LeftBorder> <RightBorder> <Color>Black</Color> <Style>None</Style> <Width>1pt</Width> </RightBorder> </Style> </Textbox> <Textbox Name="Textbox_18"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <CanShrink>true</CanShrink> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=Microsoft.Dynamics.Framework.Reports.DataMethodUtility.PostDataMethodEvaluation(Microsoft.Dynamics.Framework.Reports.DataMethodUtility.UpdateAxContextPartition(Parameters!AX_CompanyName.Value, Parameters!AX_UserContext.Value, Parameters!AX_RenderingCulture.Value, Parameters!AX_PartitionKey.Value),Microsoft.Dynamics.Framework.Reports.DataMethodUtility.GetFullCompanyNameForUser(Parameters!AX_CompanyName.Value, Parameters!AX_UserContext.Value))</Value> <Style> <FontStyle>Normal</FontStyle> <FontFamily>Segoe UI</FontFamily> <FontSize>8pt</FontSize> <FontWeight>Normal</FontWeight> <TextDecoration>None</TextDecoration> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style> <TextAlign>Left</TextAlign> </Style> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <Top>0.28293in</Top> <Height>0.16168in</Height> <Width>5.925in</Width> <ZIndex>1</ZIndex> <Style> <TopBorder> <Color>Black</Color> <Style>None</Style> <Width>1pt</Width> </TopBorder> <BottomBorder> <Color>Black</Color> <Style>None</Style> <Width>1pt</Width> </BottomBorder> <LeftBorder> <Color>Black</Color> <Style>None</Style>
